_comment: Hand-curated redirects. Auto-derivable redirects (videos, topics, sim deep links, per-part videos pages) are generated by render_redirects.py and don't belong here. See content/lib/redirects.py for the slug taxonomy.
_errata_note: Per-edition 'errata-<edition>' slugs and the 'errata' alias are auto-generated by render_redirects.py — do not add them here.
